content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the fail-closed run-binding changes in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` and the related run-id capture plumbing. I did not find an in-scope correctness, safety, or robustness issue to amend. I also spot-checked the new `test-stub` daemon-loop tests for missing `workflow_run_id`, persistence-failure handling, and completed-run retry behavior.

## Amendments

None.
